subject: fix(quality): address code review findings across 8 files
body:
Fixes bugs, accessibility gaps, and UX issues identified during review:
- Rename nodeSaveFailed → saveFailed (was semantically wrong for arc saves)
- Normalize message tone (consistent contractions across all error messages)
- Add completion/error feedback toasts for "Check for Updates" button
- Add retry limit (3 max) to ErrorBoundary to prevent infinite error loops
- Add role="alert" to ErrorBoundary fallback for screen reader announcements
- Add aria-activedescendant + item IDs to ContextMenu for screen reader focus
- Add aria-controls + content ID to MergeSection for accessible expand/collapse
- Restore decision documentation for ImportModal file selection approach

Tags: review, accessibility, ux, error-handling, aria
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality
Semver: patch

title: address code review findings across 8 files
